evals.prompt: Calculate test coverage for calculator.py using test_calculator.py and save the chart to ./fig directory. The test file is at ./test_calculator.py and source file is at ./calculator.py. Output the coverage percentages and ensure the chart is generated.
evals.expected_output: Line and branch coverage percentages, coverage chart saved to ./fig/coverage_calculator.png

evals.prompt: I need to analyze test coverage for my Python code. Run coverage analysis on test_calculator.py against calculator.py and generate a visual report. Save any charts to the ./coverage_charts directory.
evals.expected_output: Coverage analysis results with percentages, chart saved to ./coverage_charts/coverage_calculator.png

evals.prompt: Check test coverage for a non-existent file. Try to calculate coverage for test_nonexistent.py against missing_source.py to see how the skill handles missing files.
evals.expected_output: Appropriate error message about missing files, graceful error handling
